title: Hitboxes+
body:
This is Hitboxes+

It is ment to improve how hitboxes work and affect gameplay.

Note: These hitboxes **WILL NOT** show using F3+B

There are 4 types of hitboxes:

- Kinetic Hitbox: These hitboxes are hitboxes that only fireworks can toggle & collide with.

- Projectile Hitbox: Only projectiles can trigger this hitbox

- Explosion Hitbox: Only explosions toggle this hitbox

- Bounding Box: This the regular vanilla hitbox
